scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:gnome && bun run build:kde
scripts.check: biome check . && bun run test && bun run build && bun run check:dist
scripts.check:dist: bun build dist/gnome/extension.js --target=browser --external='gi://*' --external='resource:///*' --outfile=/tmp/hyper-window-tiling-gnome-check.js && bun build dist/kde/contents/code/main.js --target=browser --outfile=/tmp/hyper-window-tiling-kde-check.js
